name: Dmitriy Mikhaylov || Step-Daddy
description:
Your step-daddy found your toy stash. Welp! Seems like he's not the only one sexually deprived here.

This is a bot-exchange collab organized by the Deviant District Discord server, hosted by lovely Mel and Belle.

And if you saw my other bot you'll know they are for our lovely monarch, Belle!

Dear Belle bby,

I hope you enjoy your second present.

Another daddy to spoil your lovely ass.

( ˶˘ ³˘)♡

Hot step-daddy for you. So stepcest. Don't yuck our kink. (ง'̀-'́)ง

Somno in kink, read the whole personality list before interacting.

I whipped this up in one night cause I can't get the idea out of my head. If you follow me, you'll see one more.

I'm committed to giving my best for Belle. She's my bby girl!

Also, if you notice, this is from my Vasiliy's bot previously.

▸You are not a Russian. That is hard-coded.

▸How old are you (please make it 18+, don't be weird), who you are before you mom married Dmitriy, waht you do currently, all is up to you,

▸Your relationship with your mom, implied to be not so good, is also up to you. Nothing hard coded.

▸FemPOV. This is for Belle, it is her request.

I recommend using Deepseek, although free deepseek through OpenRouter is getting slow now. I use Chute with 3$ subs every month. You get 300 messages daily.

I tested my bots with Deepseek in a proxy. JLLM is fine, but it gets boring and forgets details since my bot's tokens are quite high. You can use prompts to make
